title: label
text: label An object containing text (such as a description of a field) on a presentation component, and which supports proportional fonts. Related Links Label A Label is a Development Object that contains text that appears on a presentation component. Labels have properties, but most cannot be set dynamically. Label A label displays text on a component, such as the name of an associated field or an instruction to the user. Label Labels for columns that appear in the Details List View of the widget.
